name: Jack Kroninger
headline: Workday Integrations Consultant
summary: Analyst at Deloitte working in technical Workday integrations. Background in systems thinking, end-to-end builds.

highlights: Serve as functional Subject Matter Advisor to a cohort of 22 state agencies, fielding ~5 functional questions and delivering 1–2 process demos per week to drive pre-go-live readiness
Researched, designed, and built a custom in-tenant job aids / help text proof of concept that was adopted into production, now serving ~500 state employees across 92 agencies
Researched and prototyped a second proof of concept for custom in-flight business process notifications
Loaded 32 spend categories into a state-and-local-government demo tenant used to support Workday pre-sales pursuits
Produced 8 client-facing pitch decks supporting Workday's state government sales pipeline spanning all 50 states
Designed and prototyped a vector-database OSINT tool to accelerate pre-sales research, using FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL with pgvector, LangChain, the Anthropic API, and Mistral embeddings
Delivered 3 code documentation reports to support a client development team, saving 6+ technical hours per week
Led a cohort of 5 interns in developing an LLM-based application using Deloitte's internal firm models
Presented 2 completed change requests to clients to gather final acceptance feedback
Produced 9 social media videos per week for 3 separate clients across 5 platforms
Built an internal software tool to automate data entry and reporting, saving 10+ hours of analyst time per week
Drove a 300% increase in client social media engagement over a two-month period
Built a donor management SaaS platform for nonprofit organizations
Founded and scaled the platform to 10+ monthly recurring nonprofit customers
Arranged 5+ product demos per month with prospective customers
Built and maintained the marketing site on WordPress, attracting 100+ unique monthly visitors
Increased monthly recurring donations by 15% year-over-year
Integrated Google Workspace and Asana to streamline donor-management workflows, saving the organization 10+ hours per week
Executed a direct-mail marketing campaign yielding a 250% return on investment
Owned the firm's first AI integration initiative end-to-end
Scoped the problem space by interviewing portfolio managers and analysts to identify pain points in the equity research process
Built a "chat with documents" application using ChromaDB as a vector database, supporting both single-document queries and queries against the growing corpus for generalized market context
Managed a development budget of $500 per month for tooling and infrastructure
Demo well received by leadership; firm assigned a full-time analyst post-internship to productionize the solution as an internal tool
Led a team of 3 first-year developers during the final week of the internship to support release-ready development
Researched and analyzed 3 publicly traded technology companies, presenting investment theses to the team of portfolio managers
Recommendation achieved a 75% year-over-year return on the proposed investment
